Uses of Class
org.bukkit.inventory.MerchantRecipe

  • Packages that use MerchantRecipe 
    Package Description
    org.bukkit.event.entity
    Events relating to entities, excluding some directly referencing some more specific entity types.
    org.bukkit.inventory
    Classes involved in manipulating player inventories and item interactions.

    • Uses of MerchantRecipe in org.bukkit.event.entity

      Methods in org.bukkit.event.entity that return MerchantRecipe 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      MerchantRecipe VillagerReplenishTradeEvent.getRecipe()
      Get the recipe to replenish.
      MerchantRecipe VillagerAcquireTradeEvent.getRecipe()
      Get the recipe to be acquired.
      Methods in org.bukkit.event.entity with parameters of type MerchantRecipe 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void VillagerReplenishTradeEvent.setRecipe(MerchantRecipe recipe)
      Set the recipe to replenish.
      void VillagerAcquireTradeEvent.setRecipe(MerchantRecipe recipe)
      Set the recipe to be acquired.
      Constructors in org.bukkit.event.entity with parameters of type MerchantRecipe 
      Constructor and Description
      VillagerAcquireTradeEvent(Villager what, MerchantRecipe recipe) 
      VillagerReplenishTradeEvent(Villager what, MerchantRecipe recipe, int bonus) 

    • Uses of MerchantRecipe in org.bukkit.inventory

      Methods in org.bukkit.inventory that return MerchantRecipe 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      MerchantRecipe Merchant.getRecipe(int i)
      Get the recipe at a certain index of this merchant's trade list.
      MerchantRecipe MerchantInventory.getSelectedRecipe()
      Get the currently selected recipe.
      Methods in org.bukkit.inventory that return types with arguments of type MerchantRecipe 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      List<MerchantRecipe> Merchant.getRecipes()
      Get a list of trades currently available from this merchant.
      Methods in org.bukkit.inventory with parameters of type MerchantRecipe 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void Merchant.setRecipe(int i, MerchantRecipe recipe)
      Set the recipe at a certain index of this merchant's trade list.
      Method parameters in org.bukkit.inventory with type arguments of type MerchantRecipe 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void Merchant.setRecipes(List<MerchantRecipe> recipes)
      Set the list of trades currently available from this merchant.
